name: Input Data
description: Specify the input expression data file. For 10x Genomics MTX format, also provide the accompanying gene names and cell barcodes files.

name: Model Selection
description: Choose a built-in pre-trained CellTypist model for cell type annotation, or supply your own custom model file.

name: Prediction Settings
description: Configure how cell type labels are assigned to each cell, including single-label versus multi-label prediction and the probability threshold for assignment.

name: Majority Voting
description: Optionally smooth predictions by majority voting within transcriptionally similar cell neighborhoods. Useful for reducing noise in ambiguous or transitional cell states.

name: Output Options
description: Control the naming of output files and whether visualization plots (UMAP and dot plots) are generated alongside the annotation results.
